name: How is fault determined if Perplexity says they didn't train on my work?
description: Discovery forces data reveal; outputs suffice.[1]

mainEntity.name: How is fault determined if Perplexity says they didn't train on my work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Discovery forces data reveal; outputs suffice.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Discovery reveals training data; outputs prove reproduction regardless.[1] NYT alleges direct infringement from inputs/outputs.[1] Key factors: model transparency subpoenas, reverse engineering.[1] Burden shifts post-discovery. AI opacity favors plaintiffs initially.
